articles.title: Alia Bhatt & Sharvari are total Alphas in YRF’s popcorn action entertainer - Alpha!
articles.description: Yash Raj Films has dropped the trailer of Alpha, headlined by Alia Bhatt and also starring Sharvari, that sets up a relishing, fun origin story of two deadly girls in a popcorn action entertainer! The trailer also unveils more of the character of Bobby Deol, a ruthless mentor to Alia Bhatt. Alia plays an assassin raised and built to kill who goes toe to toe with her mentor turned foe. It also reveals Anil Kapoor, who is teased to be connected to the Alpha program! Packed with high-octane action, slick visuals with a promise of a super fun, thrilling ride, Alpha positions itself as a true-blue entertainer that celebrates the fearless Alpha attitude of two girls - Alia & Sharvari. Sharvari’s character arc is purposely kept under wraps in the trailer as she plays a very important role in the film, but the trailer signifies her teaming up with Alia in a bid to stop Bobby Deol at any cost. Elevating the stylised, cool visuals of Alpha is the pulsating background score! Global Top DJ HUGEL's worldwide chartbuster track Jamaican Bam Bam has been incorporated in the trailer to bring in a relentless burst of energy to the trailer, symbolic of the adrenaline rush that Alpha seeks to generate when people see the film in theatres. Directed by Shiv Rawail, the film is set to release worldwide, exclusively in cinemas, on July 3, 2026. Catch the Alpha Official Trailer Here:
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Valentina Tereshkova: The Factory Worker Who Became the First Woman in Space
articles.description: On June 16, 1963, Valentina Tereshkova made history as the first woman to travel into space. Born into a working-class family and employed at a textile factory, she had no pilot training or engineering degree. Her passion for parachuting, however, earned her a place in the Soviet Union’s pioneering female cosmonaut program. Flying aboard Vostok 6 under the call sign “Chaika,” she spent nearly three days in orbit, circling Earth 48 times. Tereshkova’s achievement shattered barriers and challenged expectations, proving that extraordinary accomplishments can emerge from the most ordinary beginnings and inspiring generations of women worldwide.

articles.title: The Great Indian Housing Dilemma: Rent, Buy... What Should You Choose?
articles.description: Buying a home in India is no longer the straightforward middle-class milestone it once was. With over half of new properties priced above Rs 1.5 crore, rising interest rates, increasing rents, and hidden ownership costs, the decision between renting and buying has become more complex than ever.This video breaks down the real numbers behind home ownership, compares long-term renting vs buying, and explores whether property is still a strong investment in today’s market.

articles.title: Guarded by memory, woven by hand: The enduring Tangail sari
articles.description: Tangail saris, a traditional handwoven cotton craft from Bangladesh and West Bengal, are undergoing a modern transformation. While preserving their delicate motifs and airy drape, contemporary designs feature larger patterns and new color palettes. This evolution aims to attract a new generation of wearers. The craft, recognized by UNESCO and GI tagged in India, faces challenges from industrial production.
